name: sotn-local
description: Bridges Claude to a local llama-server for SOTN decompilation drafts.
long_description:
Exposes a locally running OpenAI-compatible model (llama.cpp / llama-server) as MCP tools for the Castlevania: Symphony of the Night decompilation project.

Large assembly and diff text are processed inside the server, so only compact structured results reach Claude's context. Drafting therefore costs zero Claude tokens.

The server runs inside WSL2 and reaches llama-server on the Windows host. That requires WSL mirrored networking (networkingMode=mirrored in .wslconfig), or a base URL pointing at the host IP instead of localhost.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check the local llama-server is reachable and list served models

tools.name: local_chat
tools.description: Generic chat completion against the local model

tools.name: local_draft
tools.description: Produce a first-pass C draft from MIPS assembly

tools.name: local_summarize_diff
tools.description: Reduce asm-differ output to the first divergence and a score hint

tools.name: local_transform
tools.description: Apply one mechanical transformation to a C function

repo_path.title: Repository path (as WSL sees it)
repo_path.description: Absolute WSL path to the sotn-decomp repo. A Windows folder C:\Users\you\Documents\SOTN-Decomp is /mnt/c/Users/you/Documents/SOTN-Decomp in WSL.

wsl_distro.title: WSL distribution
wsl_distro.description: Which WSL distro to run in. Must be the one with the build toolchain, not docker-desktop.

llama_base_url.title: llama-server base URL
llama_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, ending in /v1. Reaching a Windows-hosted server from WSL requires mirrored networking.

llama_model.title: Model id
llama_model.description: Must match exactly what /v1/models reports, or requests return 404.
